messageConfigurationTypesCouldNotBeLoade: Configuration types could not be loaded. Fallback is used.
messageSessionInvalidOrLoginRequired: Session is no longer valid or login is required.
messageSessionExpiredOrLoginRequired: Session has expired or login is required.
messageDownloadOnlyAvailableForWeb: Download is currently only implemented for web.

messageDetectedNextServerUrl: The file will probably change the server address to {{url}}.

messagePortChangeDialogDescription: The selected configuration changes the server address from {{currentUrl}} to {{nextUrl}}. Do you want to switch automatically to the new address after the upload?
